internal/tui/app.go.one_line: Root Bubble Tea model with Init/Update/View, dual views (dashboard+channels), data-loading commands, and auto-refresh

internal/tui/app_test.go.one_line: 28 comprehensive tests covering view switching, key bindings, error handling, refresh/summarize operations, filtering, and multi-source integration

internal/tui/channels.go.one_line: Sources view sub-model with channel list navigation, delete confirmation, and three-step add-source wizard

internal/tui/channels_test.go.one_line: 17 comprehensive tests for channelsModel covering rendering, cursor navigation, delete confirmation, add-source wizard flow, and source type badges

internal/tui/dashboard.go.one_line: Dashboard view sub-model with date navigation (◄/►), expandable summary cards, filtering by source type, and filter overlay integration

internal/tui/dashboard_test.go.one_line: 30+ comprehensive tests for dashboardModel covering date navigation, filtering, cursor/scroll behavior, expand/collapse state, text wrapping, and visual rendering

internal/tui/filter.go.one_line: Filter struct with type/name match logic; provides SQL query parameter helpers and UI display labels

internal/tui/filter_overlay.go.one_line: Bubble Tea model for interactive source filter picker overlay with checkbox list and keyboard navigation

internal/tui/filter_overlay_test.go.one_line: 9 tests for filter overlay covering initialization, navigation, selection, confirm/cancel actions, and filter construction

internal/tui/filter_test.go.one_line: 13 tests for SourceFilter covering IsEmpty, Match, MatchingChannelIDs, MatchingSourceNames, and FilterLabel methods

internal/tui/help.go.one_line: Bubble Tea model for help overlay with keyboard shortcuts organized in Navigation, Dashboard, and Sources sections

internal/tui/help_test.go.one_line: 5 tests for helpModel covering View rendering, key binding labels, and Update message handling

internal/tui/keys.go.one_line: Package-level keyMap struct and keys variable; defines 18 key bindings for navigation, view switching, and TUI operations

internal/tui/styles.go.one_line: Package-level style variables using lipgloss; defines 24 style rules and 5 base colors for all TUI component rendering

internal/tui/types.go.one_line: Message types for Bubble Tea event flow; display data models (SummaryItem, ChannelItem); SummarizeService and RefreshService interfaces
